title: Vellum: Godot 4.x & Independent Dobsonian Games Expansion (Field Ops & Threshold Affairs)
problem: Field Ops and Threshold Affairs are two distinct Dobsonian games that were previously awkwardly linked together. To support their active development in Godot 4.x, Vellum requires explicit uncoupling of these titles into separate game lanes (godot-field-ops and godot-threshold-affairs), separate thematic taxonomies, ORM PBR texture bakes, element-level indexing, unparked Unity intake, and direct Godot developer tooling.
desired_outcome: Vellum explicitly treats Field Ops and Threshold Affairs as separate, independent Godot 4.x game targets. Godot-ready GLB models, ORM PBR textures, Ogg/WAV audio, and individual prop search are available via Vellum's HTTP API, CLI (vellum pull), and Godot Editor Plugin without coupling game identities.
constraints: Field Ops and Threshold Affairs are separate independent game targets — never merge them into a generic Dobsonian bucket.
Never store raw marketplace packs or keys in git repositories.
Vault I/O off the press host is strictly HTTP-only.
Godot targets must output clean glTF 2.0/GLB, ORM packed textures (Red=AO, Green=Roughness, Blue=Metallic), and Ogg/WAV audio.
Record all work in CFD and mirror in-repo so agents retain context.
acceptance_signals: Field Ops (godot-field-ops) and Threshold Affairs (godot-threshold-affairs) exist as separate, uncoupled game lanes in Vellum catalog schema, API, and UI.
ORMMaterial3D texture channel packing and Ogg audio conversion are integrated into the Conversion Factory.
Element-level asset search enables finding individual props across all 37 vault packs.
Unity tier extraction is unparked to supply 3D environments and props.
vellum pull CLI command delivers manifested assets directly into Godot project roots.

non_negotiables: Separate Field Ops and Threshold Affairs completely
Keep vault I/O HTTP-only off press
Produce clean Godot 4.x GLB + ORM bakes
rejected_approaches: Merging Field Ops and Threshold Affairs into a single Dobsonian bucket
Dumping raw marketplace packs into Godot git repos
Relying on chat memory instead of durable CFD records
requests: Uncouple Dobsonian games in catalog and UI
Build Godot 4.x intake and delivery pipeline
Support CLI and Godot plugin ingestion

plan.title: Godot 4.x & Independent Dobsonian Expansion Plan
plan.summary: Uncouple Field Ops & Threshold Affairs into independent Godot 4.x game lanes; build ORM PBR texture bakes; index element-level props; unpark Unity tier; ship CLI + Godot plugin delivery.

phases.title: Phase 1: Uncouple Dobsonian Games & Independent Lanes
phases.summary: Define separate godot-field-ops and godot-threshold-affairs game lanes in backend schema, catalog APIs, and UI filters.

tasks.title: Update catalog schema for independent godot-field-ops and godot-threshold-affairs lanes
tasks.description: Add godot-field-ops and godot-threshold-affairs to backend/game_ready.py, backend/register.py, and UI dropdowns.
acceptance: godot-field-ops and godot-threshold-affairs are recognized as separate valid lanes
Catalog API filters by lane: godot-field-ops vs godot-threshold-affairs independently

phases.title: Phase 2: Godot 4.x Pipeline Foundations
phases.summary: Implement ORM PBR texture packing (AO, Roughness, Metallic) and Ogg Vorbis audio bakes in export jobs.

tasks.title: Implement ORM texture channel packing job in tools/pipeline/jobs/
tasks.description: Pack Ambient Occlusion (R), Roughness (G), and Metallic (B) into single ORM textures for Godot ORMMaterial3D.
acceptance: ORM textures generated during export-media job

phases.title: Phase 3: Element-Level Search & Dobsonian Taxonomy
phases.summary: Index individual mesh assets within packs and add #field-ops and #threshold-affairs thematic tags.

tasks.title: Index individual pack assets and apply game-specific thematic tags
tasks.description: Expose prop-level search across all 37 vault packs for Field Ops and Threshold Affairs.
acceptance: Field Ops and Threshold Affairs have separate thematic tags

phases.title: Phase 4: Expanded Import & Blender Engine
phases.summary: Unpark Unity tier extraction and integrate headless Blender assembly pipeline.

tasks.title: Unpark Unity tier .unitypackage extraction pipeline
tasks.description: Extract .unitypackage assets to GLB for Godot intake.
acceptance: Unity 3D environment assets extracted to GLB

phases.title: Phase 5: Godot Developer Tools (vellum pull & Godot Plugin)
phases.summary: Ship vellum pull CLI utility and Godot Editor Plugin for direct project ingestion.

tasks.title: Build vellum pull CLI utility and Godot Editor Plugin
tasks.description: Allow one-command or one-click asset ingestion into Godot project roots.
acceptance: vellum pull fetches manifested elements into res://assets/vellum/
Godot plugin displays catalog and imports assets
